description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, slightly curved body with a woven straw-like exterior in a natural beige color, accented by a repeating diagonal geometric pattern in black. The edges and corners are reinforced with a black fabric trim, providing both structure and contrast to the woven material. A single black wrist strap is attached to one side, allowing for easy carrying or hanging. The bag appears to have a zipper closure running along the top edge, ensuring secure storage of personal items. The overall design is minimalist yet stylish, with the woven pattern giving it a handcrafted, artisanal feel. The interior is likely lined with fabric for added durability and protection of contents.
description: A rectangular woven handbag with a black geometric pattern, black trim, and a single wrist strap, featuring a top zipper closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full woven pattern with black diagonal accents and black trim framing the edges.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile of the handbag and the thickness of the black trim.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with the same woven pattern and black trim visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the attachment point of the wrist strap.
attribute_strap_type: Single short wrist strap, non-adjustable, attached at one end of the bag.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure along the top edge of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Diagonal geometric pattern in black on a woven beige background.
